action_set_definitions.name: get_claim_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the core details of a claim, including current status and internal assessment state.

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim (e.g., CLM-EO-4432).

action_set_definitions.name: get_policy_and_ledger
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves policy terms (limit type) and current financial data including defense spend and budget status.

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_lmg_compliance
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the document vault and litigation management guidelines (LMG) for compliance.

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim.

action_set_definitions.name: reconcile_and_post_settlement
action_set_definitions.description: Reconciles the defense spend against the policy limits and records the proposed settlement amount.

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim.

settlement_amount.description: The final settlement amount to be posted.

reconciled_defense_spend.description: The confirmed defense cost to be deducted from the eroding limit.

action_set_definitions.name: update_claim_status
action_set_definitions.description: Transitions the claim to a new workflow status.

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim.

state_description.claim_id: Unique identifier for the insurance claim.
state_description.policy_details: Details of the insurance policy associated with the claim, including coverage limits and deductibles.
state_description.claimant_history: Internal record of the claimant's past claims and risk profile.
state_description.document_vault: Status of required documents (e.g., medical invoices, police reports, photos).
state_description.internal_assessment_state: Internal tracking of the adjudication progress.
